reels.title: O Taareee
reels.description: Group of friends, who, for love, friendship and wooing the most beautiful girl in the college, tumble into a politically driven plot where a sudden murder brings them face to face with each other and a reality that shakes them to their core.

reels.title: Mijaaj
reels.description: Jay, Jhanvi, and Yogesh come to the aid of Sarita Ben, an old lady who owns a heritage property - a lodge, when an MNC wants to buy her property, leaving several people homeless. The three youngsters fight against these powerful people.

reels.title: Lagan Laagii Re
reels.description: In a world full of love stories, two friends are on a mission to stop one.

reels.title: Roshni — Brand Film
reels.description: A meditative brand film for a sustainable Indian textiles label. Shot across the ghats of Varanasi at golden hour, the film celebrates the quiet dignity of handloom weavers and the warmth of natural dyes.

reels.title: Raag — Music Video
reels.description: Visual accompaniment for an indie fusion artist blending Hindustani classical ragas with electronic production. High-contrast lighting, slow-motion tabla sequences, and peacock-blue chroma work.

reels.title: Kahāni — Short Film
reels.description: Award-winning short following a retired railway conductor on his last journey through Rajasthan. Intimate handheld cinematography, natural window light, and a warm sepia grade that feels like old Kodak.

reels.title: Sārang — Fashion Film
reels.description: A high-fashion editorial for a couture bridal label. Shot in a crumbling haveli in Jodhpur, the film juxtaposes ancient Rajput architecture with ultra-modern silhouettes.

reels.title: Udān — Documentary
reels.description: A short documentary portrait of kite-makers in Ahmedabad during Uttarayan. Long lenses, rooftop light, and the chaos of ten thousand kites in an Amdavadi sky.

reels.title: Āñch — Brand Spot
reels.description: A 60-second brand spot for a premium Indian spice company. Macro cinematography of whole spices, steam, and flame — a sensory film that smells through the screen.

reels.title: Nritya — Performance Film
reels.description: A performance film for a Bharatanatyam dancer — capturing mudras, footwork, and expression with high-speed cameras and dramatic single-source lighting. Premiered at the MAMI Film Festival.

reels.title: Patang — Music Video
reels.description: Aerial and street-level cinematography for an Ahmedabad-based indie band. The video weaves rooftop life, Old City alleyways, and the Sabarmati riverfront into a love letter to the city.

projects.title: O Taareee
projects.subtitle: Gujarati Feature Film
projects.description: Group of friends, who, for love, friendship and wooing the most beautiful girl in the college, tumble into a politically driven plot where a sudden murder brings them face to face with each other and a reality that shakes them to their core.

projects.title: Mijaaj
projects.subtitle: Action / Drama Feature Film
projects.description: Jay, Jhanvi, and Yogesh come to the aid of Sarita Ben, an old lady who owns a heritage property - a lodge, when an MNC wants to buy her property, leaving several people homeless. The three youngsters fight against these powerful people.

projects.title: Lagan Laagii Re
projects.subtitle: Romantic Comedy Feature
projects.description: In a world full of love stories, two friends are on a mission to stop one.

projects.title: Roshni
projects.subtitle: Brand Film — Sustainable Textiles
projects.description: A meditation on light and craft — shot across three days in Varanasi during the winter fog season. The brief was simple: make the world see what handloom weavers already know.

projects.title: Kahāni
projects.subtitle: Short Film — MAMI Selection 2023
projects.description: Selected for Mumbai's MAMI Film Festival. A quiet, devastating portrait of departure — shot entirely on natural light through the windows of a Rajasthan-bound train.

projects.title: Nritya
projects.subtitle: Performance Film — Bharatanatyam
projects.description: High-speed and single-source lighting documentation of Bharatanatyam movement. The film became a reference piece for the intersection of classical Indian performance and cinematic form.

projects.title: Raag
projects.subtitle: Music Video — Hindustani Fusion
projects.description: Chaos and precision in the same frame — a music video that refuses to choose between Hindustani classical tradition and electronic modernity, just like the music itself.

services.name: Cinematography
services.shortDesc: Narrative-driven visual language for features, OTT, and indie films.
services.longDesc: From intimate indie dramas to large-scale productions, I craft images that serve the story first. Fluent in anamorphic, spherical, and digital acquisition. Experienced with ARRI, RED, and Sony systems across varied Indian locations — from Himalayan exteriors to the dense visual grammar of Indian city streets.

services.name: Commercial Filmmaking
services.shortDesc: Brand films and campaigns that feel cinematic, not corporate.
services.longDesc: Working with agencies and direct-to-brand clients across FMCG, fashion, luxury, and technology. Every commercial brief is treated as a short film brief — concept, lighting, movement, and edit work in harmony to create ads that audiences actually want to watch.

services.name: Music Videos
services.shortDesc: Visuals that amplify the emotion of the track — not just illustrate it.
services.longDesc: Extensive work across Bollywood, Indie Hindi, Tamil, and fusion genres. Comfortable directing and DPing simultaneously for budget-conscious productions, or leading larger crews for label projects. Strong aesthetic instinct for colour, movement, and the precise moment to cut.

services.name: Short Films
services.shortDesc: Festival-ready short film cinematography — intimate, precise, resonant.
services.longDesc: Multiple selections at MAMI, IFFK, and international festivals. I work closely with debut directors to find the visual language of their story without over-designing it. Natural light, available locations, and disciplined prep are always the starting point.

services.name: Creative Direction
services.shortDesc: End-to-end visual concepting for campaigns, lookbooks, and digital content.
services.longDesc: Beyond the camera — mood boarding, reference curation, location scouting, wardrobe palette direction, and post-grade supervision. I help brands and artists develop a coherent visual identity that travels across formats.

services.name: Color Consultation
services.shortDesc: Grade supervision and LUT development rooted in Indian skin-tone precision.
services.longDesc: A strong secondary specialty — developing show LUTs, supervising DI sessions, and consulting on colour pipeline from on-set monitoring through to final delivery. Particular expertise in grading for the rich tonal range of Indian skin across diverse lighting conditions.

contactInfo.availability: Available for projects across India & internationally
